title: Middle Eastern-Style Ground Pork Fatteh
description: A twist on the traditional Middle Eastern dish, this ground pork fatteh combines the flavors of the region with the comfort of a hearty meat pie.

ingredients.name: Middle Eastern Spices
ingredients.notes: a blend of cumin, coriander, and cinnamon

instructions: In a large skillet, cook the ground pork over medium-high heat, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks, until browned and cooked through.
Add the onion and garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
Stir in the Middle Eastern spices and cook for 1 minute.
Season the pork mixture with salt and black pepper to taste.
Cut the rustic bread into 1-inch cubes and toast in the oven until lightly browned.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked pork mixture, toasted bread, and chopped parsley.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13-inch baking dish and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned.
